subject: Double charge on my account
body: Hi, I noticed I was charged twice for my subscription this month. My account number is #45231. Please refund the extra charge immediately. This is very frustrating.

subject: Payment failed
body: My payment keeps failing even though my card details are correct. I've tried 3 times now and keep getting an error. Order #78432 is pending.

subject: Request for invoice
body: Could you please send me the invoice for last month's services? I need it for my company's accounting department by end of week.

subject: Subscription cancellation and refund
body: I cancelled my subscription 2 weeks ago but was still charged this month. I want a full refund for this unauthorized charge. This is unacceptable.

subject: Upgrade plan billing question
body: I recently upgraded from Basic to Pro plan. How will I be billed? Will I be charged the full amount or prorated for the remaining days?

subject: Wrong amount charged
body: I was charged $99 but my plan is only $49/month. This is a clear error. Please correct this immediately and refund the difference.

subject: Annual subscription discount
body: I've been a customer for 3 years. Is there any annual plan discount available? I'd like to switch if the savings are significant.

subject: Credit card expiry update
body: My credit card is expiring next month. How do I update my payment details to avoid service interruption?

subject: Tax invoice needed for business
body: I am a business customer and need a GST tax invoice for all payments made in the last financial year. Please send them to this email.

subject: Free trial charge
body: I signed up for a free trial but just got charged $29. I never agreed to any paid subscription. I demand an immediate refund.

subject: Payment receipt not received
body: I made a payment 3 days ago but haven't received a confirmation email or receipt. Can you please resend it?

subject: Dispute transaction
body: There is a transaction on my account from your company that I do not recognize. The amount is $150 dated last Tuesday. Please investigate this immediately.

subject: How to pause subscription
body: I'm going on vacation for 2 months. Can I pause my subscription instead of cancelling? I don't want to lose my data.

subject: Referral credit not applied
body: I referred 3 friends last month and was promised $30 credit per referral. None of the $90 credit has appeared on my account yet.

subject: Charged after cancellation
body: I cancelled on the 5th and was charged on the 6th. I want this reversed. I have a screenshot of my cancellation confirmation.

subject: Bulk purchase pricing
body: We are a company looking to purchase 50 licenses. Do you offer volume discounts? Please send me a quote.

subject: Monthly bill seems too high
body: My bill this month is $20 more than usual. I haven't changed my plan. Can you explain what the extra charges are for?

subject: Downgrade plan request
body: I want to downgrade from Pro to Basic plan. When will this take effect and will I get a partial refund for the remaining Pro period?

subject: PayPal payment option
body: Do you accept PayPal? I don't feel comfortable entering my credit card online. I'd prefer to pay via PayPal if possible.

subject: Failed payment - account suspended
body: My account has been suspended due to a failed payment but my bank says the charge went through. Please restore my account immediately.

subject: Student discount availability
body: I'm a university student. Do you offer student discounts? I have a valid .edu email address I can verify with.

subject: Bank declined transaction
body: My bank keeps declining the transaction even though I have sufficient funds. Is there a problem on your payment gateway end?

subject: Nonprofit pricing
body: We are a registered nonprofit organization. Do you have special pricing for nonprofits? We're interested in the Enterprise plan.

subject: Change billing date
body: My billing date is the 1st but my salary arrives on the 15th. Can I change my billing cycle to the 16th of each month?

subject: Currency conversion charges
body: I'm being charged in USD but I'm in the UK. Am I being charged extra for currency conversion? Why can't I pay in GBP?

subject: App keeps crashing on login
body: Every time I try to log in the app crashes. I've tried reinstalling twice. Using iPhone 14, iOS 17. This has been happening for 3 days.

subject: Cannot reset password
body: I requested a password reset email but never received it. I've checked spam. It's been 2 hours. I need access to my account highly.

subject: Data export not working
body: I'm trying to export my data to CSV but the download keeps failing at 80%. I need this data for a presentation tomorrow.

subject: API rate limit issue
body: We're hitting rate limits on your API at only 100 requests/minute but our plan allows 1000. Something seems wrong with our account configuration.

subject: Integration with Slack not working
body: I connected my account to Slack but notifications aren't coming through. I've disconnected and reconnected 3 times. Still broken.

subject: Website extremely slow
body: Your website is loading in 15+ seconds for me. This has been happening since yesterday. My internet is fine — other sites load instantly.

subject: Two-factor authentication locked me out
body: I lost my phone and now 2FA is locking me out of my account. I have my backup codes but they aren't working. Please help.

subject: File upload size limit
body: I'm trying to upload a 500MB file but keep getting an error saying limit exceeded. The documentation says 1GB is allowed on my plan.

subject: Browser extension not working on Firefox
body: Your Chrome extension works fine but the Firefox version keeps throwing errors. Console shows: TypeError undefined is not a function.

subject: SSO login not working for company
body: We set up SSO with our company's Azure AD but employees can't log in. Getting error: 'SAML assertion invalid'. Our IT team has verified the configuration.

subject: Mobile app not syncing
body: My data on mobile app is 2 days behind what's on the web version. Force syncing doesn't help. Android 13, app version 4.2.1.

subject: Dark mode not saving preference
body: Every time I log out and back in, dark mode resets to light mode. I've changed this setting 10 times. It won't stick.

subject: Webhook not firing
body: I've set up a webhook for order completion events but it stopped firing 3 days ago. Checked the endpoint — it's working fine on our end.

subject: Search feature not returning results
body: The search bar returns 0 results for everything now. Even searching my own name shows nothing. This worked fine last week.

subject: Email notifications going to spam
body: All your notification emails end up in my spam folder. I've marked them as not spam multiple times but it keeps happening.

subject: Cannot delete account
body: I want to delete my account but the delete button on the settings page does nothing when I click it. No error, nothing happens.

subject: Keyboard shortcut conflict
body: Your app's Ctrl+S shortcut conflicts with my system's screenshot tool. Is there a way to remap or disable shortcuts?

subject: Database connection timeout
body: Our enterprise installation keeps throwing database connection timeout errors during peak hours (9-11am). Affecting 200 users.

subject: Image compression quality too low
body: When I upload high-res images they get compressed too aggressively. The output quality is unusable for print. Is there a way to disable compression?

subject: API documentation error
body: The API docs say the endpoint is POST /api/v2/users but it's actually /api/v3/users. This wasted hours of our developer's time.

subject: Print layout broken
body: When printing reports from your app, the layout breaks and cuts off the right side. This happens in both Chrome and Safari.

subject: Timezone showing wrong time
body: All scheduled events show in UTC even though I set my timezone to IST. I've updated it in settings 3 times. Still showing UTC.

subject: Cannot connect to VPN and access app
body: When connected to our company VPN I cannot access your web app at all. It works fine without VPN. Could be an IP whitelist issue?

subject: Language not changing to Japanese
body: I changed the language to Japanese in settings but the app still shows in English. I've cleared cache, tried different browsers. Still English.

subject: Bulk import failing silently
body: I'm trying to bulk import 5000 records via CSV. The import says successful but only 200 records appear. No error message shown.

subject: YOU HAVE WON $1,000,000!!!
body: CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have been selected as our lucky winner. Click here immediately to claim your $1,000,000 prize. Limited time offer. ACT NOW!!!

subject: Enlarge your business profits NOW
body: Make $5000 a day working from home! Our proven system has helped 10,000 people. No experience needed. Buy our course for just $9.99. Click here!

subject: Your account has been compromised - verify now
body: We detected suspicious activity on your account. Click the link below immediately to verify your identity or your account will be suspended in 24 hours.

subject: Hot singles in your area
body: Thousands of singles are waiting to meet you! Join free today and find your perfect match. Photos available. Sign up now at our website.

subject: Cheap medications - no prescription needed
body: Buy medications online without a prescription! Lowest prices guaranteed. Discreet shipping. Viagra, Cialis and more. Order now and save 80%!

subject: Investment opportunity - 300% returns guaranteed
body: Exclusive crypto investment opportunity. Our AI trading bot guarantees 300% returns in 30 days. Invest just $500 today. Spots limited. Reply now.

subject: Your package could not be delivered
body: We attempted to deliver your package but nobody was home. Click the link to reschedule delivery and pay the $2.99 redelivery fee. Expires in 48hrs.

subject: Lose 30 pounds in 30 days
body: Doctors hate this one simple trick! Our miracle weight loss supplement will help you lose 30 pounds in just 30 days. No diet or exercise needed. Order now!

subject: Nigerian Prince needs your help
body: I am Prince Emmanuel of Nigeria. I have $45 million USD that I need to transfer. I need your bank account details to complete the transfer. You will receive 30% commission.

subject: IRS Notice: Outstanding tax debt
body: high: You owe $4,823 in unpaid taxes. Failure to pay in 24 hours will result in arrest. Call our toll-free number immediately to avoid legal action.

subject: Free iPhone 15 - Survey Complete
body: You've been selected to receive a FREE iPhone 15! Just complete a 30-second survey and pay $4.99 shipping. Only 3 left! Claim yours before midnight.

subject: Exclusive business partnership
body: Hello Business Owner, I have reviewed your company profile and believe we can generate $50,000/month together. No investment needed. Reply with your phone number.

subject: Unsubscribe failed - last warning
body: Your unsubscribe request failed. You will continue to receive emails. To stop emails you must verify your email by clicking the link below within 1 hour.

subject: Your Google account needs attention
body: We noticed unusual sign-in activity. Your account will be locked in 2 hours. Verify immediately at the link below: http://google-accounts-verify.xyz/login

subject: Work from home - $500/day
body: We are hiring remote workers! Earn $500 per day doing simple data entry from home. No experience required. Apply now. Limited spots available!

subject: Your computer has a virus
body: WARNING: Our security scan detected 5 viruses on your computer. Call our Microsoft Certified technicians immediately at 1-800-XXX-XXXX to remove them before data loss.

subject: Limited time: 90% off luxury watches
body: Authentic Rolex, Patek Philippe at 90% discount! Only available this weekend. Ships from Switzerland. Order 2 get 1 free. Use code: LUXURY90

subject: Claim your Bitcoin inheritance
body: You are listed as beneficiary for 2.5 Bitcoin worth $150,000. Previous owner deceased. Send $200 processing fee to release funds to your wallet.

subject: University degree in 2 weeks
body: Get an accredited Bachelor's, Master's or PhD degree in just 2 weeks! Based on life experience. No classes needed. Impress employers. Call now!

subject: Your survey reward is waiting
body: You completed a survey 3 months ago and earned a $75 Amazon gift card. Click here within 24 hours to claim before it expires. Requires email verification.

subject: Request for medical leave
body: I am writing to request 2 weeks of medical leave starting next Monday. I have attached my doctor's certificate. Please let me know the process for approval.

subject: Harassment complaint
body: I need to formally report repeated harassment by my team lead. This has been ongoing for 6 weeks. I have documented 12 incidents. I request an immediate investigation.

subject: Payroll discrepancy this month
body: My salary this month is $500 short compared to my contract. I believe overtime hours from last month were not included. Please review.

subject: Work from home policy question
body: With the new hybrid policy, I'm confused about how many WFH days I'm allowed per week. My manager says 2 but the policy document says 3. Can you clarify?

subject: Performance review appeal
body: I received a 'below expectations' rating but my KPIs were all met or exceeded. I want to formally appeal this review with supporting documentation.

subject: Maternity leave planning
body: I'm 5 months pregnant and need to understand my maternity leave entitlements, pay during leave, and how to formally notify the company.

subject: Training budget approval
body: I would like to attend an AWS certification course costing $800. Can this be covered by the professional development budget? My manager has given verbal approval.

subject: Resignation letter
body: Please accept this email as my formal resignation effective 30 days from today. I have enjoyed my time here and will ensure a smooth handover of my responsibilities.

subject: Team building event feedback
body: I wanted to share some feedback about last week's team building event. While the concept was good, the timing (9pm on a Friday) was not inclusive for employees with families.

subject: Accommodation request for disability
body: I have been diagnosed with a repetitive strain injury and need a standing desk and ergonomic keyboard. I have a doctor's letter. Please advise the process.

subject: Annual leave balance question
body: My leave balance shows 5 days but I calculated I should have 12 days remaining. Can someone verify this? I'm planning a trip next month.

subject: Promotion discussion request
body: I've been in my current role for 3 years and feel I'm ready for a senior position. I'd like to schedule a meeting to discuss the promotion process and timeline.

subject: Salary negotiation after competing offer
body: I have received a competing job offer with 30% higher salary. Before deciding, I want to give the company an opportunity to match. Can we discuss?

subject: Expense reimbursement delay
body: I submitted my expense report 6 weeks ago for $1,200 in travel expenses. I still haven't been reimbursed. This is impacting my personal finances.

subject: New employee onboarding question
body: I start next Monday and I'm wondering what I should bring on my first day, what time to arrive, and who I should ask for when I get to the office.

subject: General product question
body: Hi, I'm considering signing up but wanted to know if your product integrates with Microsoft Teams. I couldn't find this info on your website.

subject: Partnership proposal
body: I represent a digital marketing agency with 50,000 followers. We'd love to discuss a partnership or affiliate program. Can we schedule a call this week?

subject: Feature request: Dark mode
body: Love the product! One request — can you add dark mode? I use this late at night and the bright white screen is hard on my eyes. Would really appreciate it.

subject: Media inquiry
body: I'm a journalist at TechCrunch writing an article about productivity tools. I'd love to include your product. Can I speak with someone from your PR team?

subject: Accessibility concerns
body: I'm visually impaired and use a screen reader. Several parts of your app are not accessible. I'd like to report specific issues and discuss improvements.

subject: Thank you for great support
body: I just wanted to say thank you to your support team, especially Alex who helped me yesterday. The issue was resolved quickly and professionally. Excellent service!

subject: Competitor comparison question
body: How does your product compare to Competitor X? I'm evaluating both and trying to understand the key differences before making a decision.

subject: Product demo request
body: We are a team of 25 considering your enterprise plan. Can someone give us a product demo next week? We're particularly interested in the analytics features.

subject: Data privacy question
body: Where is my data stored? Is it GDPR compliant? We are a European company and need to ensure compliance before we can use your service.

subject: How to export my data
body: I'd like to export all my data before my subscription expires next week. Is there a way to download everything including history and settings?

subject: Open source contribution question
body: Is any part of your product open source? I'm a developer and would love to contribute or build plugins. Is there a public API or SDK available?

subject: Suggestion: Better onboarding
body: As a new user I found onboarding confusing. There was no tutorial or guide. I spent 2 hours figuring out basic features. Please consider adding an interactive tutorial.

subject: Translation/localization request
body: Do you plan to add Portuguese (Brazilian) support? I have a large audience in Brazil who would love to use your product but the language barrier is a problem.

subject: Security vulnerability report
body: I am a security researcher and found a potential XSS vulnerability on your login page. I am disclosing responsibly. Please contact me to share technical details.

subject: Annual conference sponsorship
body: We are organizing an annual tech conference expecting 2000 attendees. We are looking for sponsors at various tiers. Would your company be interested?

subject: Payment issue and login problem
body: My payment failed and now I can't log into my account. Not sure if they are related but this is high.

subject: App slow and incorrect billing
body: The app has been very slow lately and I also noticed extra charges this month. Please check both.

subject: Account locked after payment attempt
body: I tried to make a payment and now my account is locked. Is this a bug or security issue?

subject: Refund request but also feature issue
body: I want a refund because the feature I paid for doesn't work properly.

subject: Multiple problems with account
body: My account shows wrong data, billing is incorrect, and app crashes sometimes. Very disappointed.

subject: Possible data breach
body: I noticed unknown login attempts from another country. Is my account compromised?

subject: Phishing email received
body: I received an email pretending to be your company asking for my password. Is this legitimate?

subject: Unauthorized access detected
body: There are actions in my account that I did not perform. Please check immediately.

subject: This is unacceptable service
body: I have contacted support 3 times and still no resolution. This is the worst service I have ever experienced.

subject: Very frustrated with your app
body: Your app keeps crashing and nobody is fixing it. I am seriously considering cancelling.

subject: Refund me now!
body: I want my money back immediately. This product is useless and doesn't work as promised.
